images.depicts: small shaggy brown-and-white dog lying down
scruffy terrier mid-dig, dirt flying, tail up
dog's muddy face poking out of a dug hole, dirt spraying
scruffy terrier digging next to a pink piglet, both in a dirt pit
terrier close-up sniffing dirt, small round object visible near nose
wrapped green gift box with a large silver bow
baby goat with long floppy ears, walking
white goose walking, side profile, sunbeam
bunch of dark purple grapes with water droplets
acoustic guitar leaning against coiled rope
small scruffy terrier wearing a burlap hat, in a dirt pit
pink pig with small terrier dog, both in a dirt pit
scruffy terrier with a rusty pot stuck on its head, in a dirt pit
potato wearing round glasses next to a cavalier-spaniel-type dog, in a dirt pit
images.issue: the dog breed here (cavalier/spaniel type) does not match the scruffy terrier used in every other pit scene this week

line_map.line: G-g-go! Go, dog, go! The dog digs!
The dog digs! The dog digs! What is in the pit?
A pig! (a pig?!) The dog got a pig!
A pot! (a pot?!) The dog got a pot!
A hat! (a hat?!) The dog got a hat!
A cat?! (a CAT?!) The cat is mad! (hiss!)

line_map.note: content matches but dog breed is inconsistent with the rest of the sequence - see wrong_art

generate.line: A cat?! (a CAT?!) The cat is mad! (hiss!)
generate.mj_prompt: dark forest editorial photography, close-up of an angry hissing striped tabby cat popping up out of a dirt pit, fur puffed up, the same scruffy terrier dog from the digging series looking startled beside the hole, dramatic side lighting, muted green background, cinematic Montessori dark-trap aesthetic

wrong_art.issue: uses a cavalier-spaniel-type dog instead of the scruffy terrier seen in dog-digs.png, dog-digging.png, dog-digging-deep.png, hat-in-pit.png, pig-in-pit.png and pot-in-pit.png - breaks the 'dog' character continuity for the outro
wrong_art.fix: regenerate keeping the same scruffy terrier used throughout the rest of the pit sequence
wrong_art.mj_prompt: dark forest editorial photography, the same scruffy brown-and-grey terrier from the digging series, muzzle in the dirt, looking curiously at a potato wearing round wire glasses sitting in the dug pit, warm sunbeam, muted green background, cinematic Montessori dark-trap aesthetic
